title: diplotropis ferruginea
intro: Diplotropis ferruginea, also known as the Copperwood or Copper Tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It has been traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Diplotropis ferruginea include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Diplotropis ferruginea is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
